programs.title: Miniature Titoo-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programs.title: Mummys TV Time-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo comes up with a plan to make his mother stop watching soap operas. S01E09.

programs.title: Golu Boy-Titoo
programs.desc: Shera spikes Golu's drink to make him lose his voice before the singing competition. S01 E10.

programs.title: Kite Festival-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo and his friends participate in a kite competition but things take a turn in the end. S01E11.

programs.title: Holi Challenge, The-Titoo
programs.desc: During Holi, Shera is challenged to a spirited watercolour competition by Titoo. S01E12.

programs.title: Titoo Ka Tuition-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo discovers the teacher's inadequacy and resolves to rectify the situation himself. S01.
